fix: streaming text chat + voice mode brand knowledge

Text mode: Add /chat/stream SSE endpoint for real-time token streaming.
Frontend consumes stream via fetch ReadableStream, updating messages
as chunks arrive. Removes redundant query limit check.

Voice mode: Inject full brand knowledge (Carrier, Trane, Lennox, Rheem,
Goodman, Rinnai, AO Smith, Square D, Mitsubishi/Fujitsu/Daikin),
diagnostic methodology, wire sizing, refrigerant, and plumbing reference
directly into voice prompts via VOICE_KNOWLEDGE supplement. Pre-injects
error code data on each user turn so LLM has verified codes without
needing tool calls. Fixes "I don't have information on Trane" issue.

commit.message:
fix: boss confinado al techo y no se puede atacar desde abajo

- Chase: clamp XZ a tiles DFLOOR del castillo (x:282..462, z:162..246)
- Lunge: solo avanza si el tile destino es DFLOOR (no cae del techo)
- Lunge Y: boss mantiene fixedY durante el lunge (no persigue al jugador hacia abajo)
- Sword hit: verifica distancia vertical < 14m al cuerpo del boss para evitar
  golpes desde el interior del castillo a través del techo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Optimize Attitude Trajectory rendering: compress ~9,000 PathCollections to 15

Group scatter points by color into 15 fixed PathCollection objects (one per
color in _COLOR_SPECTRUM) and update incrementally via set_offsets(), reducing
draw_idle() artist traversal from O(T×K) to O(1). Also batch scatter calls
in save_attitude_trajectory_hires() (max 15 calls instead of ~9,000).

Bump version to 1.1.0 and update README, CHANGELOG, CITATION.cff, pyproject.toml.

commit.message:
fix: remove @faker-js/faker import — replace with inline random utils

NIXPACKS runs npm ci before our buildCommand, which pulls faker v10
(ESM-only) from the registry cache, crashing the CommonJS require()
chain at startup. Since lead seeding is not a prod requirement, remove
the static top-level import entirely and replace all faker calls with
lightweight inline helpers (no external deps needed).

commit.message:
fix: reduce false positives in detection rules and fix screenshot-before-block race

Detection rule improvements:
- Password regex uses letter boundaries instead of \b to avoid substring
  matches on "compass", "bypass", "passenger" while still matching
  compound names like "password_input" and "user_password"
- Wallet impersonation: common English words ("rainbow", "backpack",
  "exodus") now require "wallet" context in title/headings to trigger
- External credential form: tighten .value check to DOM API lookups
  (getElementById, querySelector, FormData) instead of matching any
  .value access like slider.value
- Obfuscated loader: exempt webpack, Parcel, Vite, Turbopack, and
  SystemJS bundler output from triggering — bundlers legitimately use
  eval() for source maps; also check raw HTML for bundler patterns
  when truncation prevents BeautifulSoup from parsing script content

Pipeline fixes:
- Screenshot captured BEFORE blocking in both scanner and backfill
  pipelines — previously fire-and-forget screenshot raced with block
  call, causing screenshots to capture "Not Found" pages
- save_verdict uses INSERT ON CONFLICT instead of INSERT OR REPLACE
  to preserve safe_browsing_flagged column on upsert
- Admin confirm now updates scan_verdicts.verdict to MALICIOUS
  (matching dismiss→CLEAN behavior) in both single and bulk paths
- looks_like_html strips XML declarations (<?xml ...?>) so XHTML
  pages are not skipped during content sniffing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix 6 wrong answers in 6th-grade maths (all L3)

- Q129: expected value £2.50→£1.70 (1.5+1.0−0.8=1.70)
- Q148: |a−b| √26→5√2 (a−b=(5,−5), |a−b|=√50=5√2)
- Q329: depreciation £7,350→£7,369.50 (12000×0.85³=7369.50)
- Q331: best buy swapped to 650g/£2.47 (£0.0038/g vs £0.0040/g)
- Q366: cosine rule result 99−70/√2→149−70√2≈50 (correct formula)
- Q447: angle C 75.5°→57.9° (cos⁻¹(51/96)≈57.9°; 75.5° was angle A)

commit.message:
Add two-way order confirmation (confirm/cancel endpoints)

- GET /confirm/:token → sets order status to CONFIRMED, clears token
- GET /confirm/cancel/:token → sets order status to CANCELLED, clears token
- Webhook generates confirmToken (UUID) + tokenExpiresAt (24h) on order create
- SMS job includes confirmUrl and cancelUrl in message

commit.message:
feat: add Auto-Balance mode to recipe builder

Users can now select ingredients without manually entering amounts and
let the app compute optimal gram values automatically.

- src/lib/autoBalance.ts: new calculation engine
  • Groups selected ingredients by category (protein, organ, fish, egg,
    vegetable, grain, fruit, fat, supplement)
  • Applies AAFCO-informed category weight fractions (dog vs cat ratios —
    cats get more protein, less/no grain per obligate-carnivore guidelines)
  • Normalizes fractions to only the categories the user actually selected
  • Distributes grams equally within each category
  • Scales the entire recipe so total kcal ≈ the pet's daily MER
  • Supplements (eggshell powder, bone meal) get a safe fixed dose rather
    than being scaled with the recipe

- src/components/recipes/IngredientPicker.tsx: autoMode prop
  • autoMode=false (default) — unchanged Manual behaviour
  • autoMode=true — multi-select mode: tapping an ingredient immediately
    adds it without a gram-entry dialog; picker stays open; already-added
    ingredients show a ✓ checkmark; Done button closes the picker

- src/pages/AddRecipePage.tsx: mode toggle + Auto-Balance button
  • Segmented control switches between Manual and Auto-Balance modes
  • Auto mode shows a description banner with per-pet scaling status
  • Ingredient rows show "auto" placeholder while pending balance
  • ⚡ Auto-Balance button runs the engine and fills in all gram values
  • Nutrition & Balance Score panel updates instantly after balancing
  • Save guard: prevents saving in Auto mode before balance is run

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix get_stock_universe() returning integer indices instead of stock codes

rq.all_instruments() returns a DataFrame with default integer index;
stock codes are in the 'order_book_id' column. Add df.set_index('order_book_id')
so that all subsequent filtering and tolist() calls return proper codes like
'601001.XSHG' instead of [0, 1, 2...].

This caused every full market scan to report 0 hits since all 5163 "codes"
were invalid integers that silently failed in analyze_stock().

commit.message:
fix: sync stability, back-to-back prevention, and 4-game hard cap

1. Realtime sync: rewrite drainSave conflict handling
   - Version conflicts now retry with fresh version (up to 5 attempts)
   - Network errors retry with fresh version from DB
   - After max retries, hard-reset to remote state
   - Safety timeout only clears localMutationRef when save isn't in-flight

2. Back-to-back prevention: completion-order rest gap
   - Replace wall-clock time windows (3min/7min) with completion-order
   - Players in the last N completed matches (N=courtCount) must rest
   - Remove allowRestRelaxation=true — courts stay idle rather than
     scheduling back-to-back games
   - Remove dynamic mode fallback that bypassed rest gap entirely

3. Game cap: hard limit of 4 games per pair
   - MAX_GAMES = 4 for both 2-court and 3-court modes (was 5 for 2-court)
   - Fallback scheduling pass now checks opponent game count before adding
   - Same fix applied in mid-session regeneration path

commit.message:
feat: v3 schema rebuild — unified products + shipments tables

Full database rebuild from 4 Excel source files:
- FlexApp_RevB: 825 products, 12,874 shipments
- IT_Display_RevB: 334 products, 3,998 shipments
- Smartwatch_RevA: 147 products (shared), 1,987 shipments
- Foldable_RevA: 104 products, 671 shipments (monthly→quarterly)

New schema: products(brand,model,application) UNIQUE, shipments with
product_id FK and normalized units_k. Migrated specs from old tables.
Updated API routes for new column names (panel_maker, units_k, quarter,
display_tech). units_shipped_k now computed via JOIN on shipments.

commit.message:
Rl train (#1)

* fix: use uv run huggingface-cli in setup.sh data download

huggingface-cli is installed in the venv, not in system PATH.
Prefix with uv run so it works without activating the venv.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use OffscreenRenderer for headless mesh-to-image rendering

open3d.visualization.Visualizer.get_view_control() returns None on
headless servers (no display). Switch to OffscreenRenderer which uses
EGL and works without a windowing system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* perf: singleton OffscreenRenderer to eliminate per-render Filament noise

Every mesh_to_image call was creating a new OffscreenRenderer, which
initializes a new Filament FEngine and prints 5 lines of EGL/OpenGL
noise. Fix: per-process singleton renderer (created once, reused).

Also suppress Open3D INFO-level logs via set_verbosity_level(Error).
Result: ~100x fewer log lines during training eval passes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: restore Visualizer-based mesh_to_image; add auto Xvfb for headless

OffscreenRenderer (Filament PBR) renders images visually different from
the Visualizer (Phong), breaking the SFT model: img IoU dropped from
~81% to ~7% at step=0.

Fix: revert to original Visualizer code + auto-start/reuse Xvfb on
the first available display (:99+) when no DISPLAY is set. Also keep
set_verbosity_level(Error) to suppress [Open3D INFO] lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: smoke test reward scale + add IoU summary with pass/fail verdict

- Remove stale *10 multiplier (reward scale fixed in ceeb33d everywhere
  except this display line)
- Add per-example progress bar: [████████░░░░░░░░░░░░]
- Add summary: N/N valid, avg IoU, verdict (✅/⚠️/❌) with thresholds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: smoke test picks N simplest meshes (by file size) for clear IoU signal

Random first-N examples give inconsistent IoU (some hard, some easy).
Sorting by mesh file size and picking smallest gives simpler geometry
where a working SFT baseline should score ≥0.5. A broken pipeline
(wrong rendering, wrong checkpoint) will clearly show ❌ avg IoU < 0.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: IoU metric tests, smoke_train dataset, and pipeline verification

- tests/test_iou.py: 11 tests — trimesh IoU shapes, normalization alignment
  (rl/reward.py [-1,1]³ vs evaluate.py [0,1]³ → same IoU), GT code→IoU≥0.95,
  invalid/empty→-1.0, compute_metrics CD output
- tools/create_smoke_dataset.py: builds data/smoke_train/ (100 simple GT pairs
  from cad-recode-v1.5 where GT code achieves IoU=1.0)
- configs/rl/smoke.yaml: 20-step smoke run on smoke_train; wandb_offline=true
- dataset.py: restore OffscreenRenderer; remove _ensure_display() dead code
- rl/dataset.py RLDataset: add modality param — pc mode generates point clouds
  lazily instead of always calling render_img() (was ignoring train_modality)
- rl/train.py: pass modality= when constructing RLDataset from hard_examples_pkl
- .gitignore: add data/smoke_train/
- progress.md: verified smoke run results (IoU step=0: 86.3%, step=10: 89.3%)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: skip missing gt_mesh_path in smoke test sorting (PR review)

os.path.getsize on every example raises FileNotFoundError if any single
entry has a stale/missing path, aborting training before smoke test begins.
Pre-filter to valid paths first so one bad record never blocks launch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
